title: White Paper Question
wikitext:
[]: White Paper Question             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon May 09, 2011 11:19 pm Who is the guy in there? The one in this picture: Russian guy? I have a feeling his name was mentioned at one point but now I don't remember it and this annoys me.

[]:             Quote Post by theobject » Thu May 12, 2011 4:21 pm Officer Nikoraef? That's not the correct way to write the Russian, I know, but that would be the straight romanization. The officer part is just a simple translation, also. Sorry it's not that in-depth.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu May 12, 2011 5:10 pm That's fine. I just wanted to know his name since it was bugging me so much! Thanks for the help!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 12, 2011 6:51 pm Nikolaev / Nikolayev.
